name: MEDICAL PROPERTIES TRUST INC
business: Medical Properties Trust, Inc. is a self-advised healthcare REIT that acquires and develops net-leased healthcare facilities and leases them to healthcare operating companies under long-term net leases, and also makes mortgage loans to healthcare operators. As of December 31, 2025, it had investments in 384 facilities across 31 U.S. states, seven European countries, and Colombia, totaling approximately $15.0 billion in assets. Its primary business strategy focuses on general acute care hospitals, behavioral health facilities, post-acute care facilities, and freestanding ER/urgent care facilities, with tenants responsible for most property costs.

exposures.sentence: Our primary business strategy is to acquire and develop healthcare facilities and lease the facilities to healthcare operating companies under long-term net leases, which require the tenant to bear most of the costs associated with the property.

catalysts.event: HSA cash rents ramp to 100% of contractual rents
catalysts.sentence: HSA is currently paying 50% of full contractual rents, and cash rents are scheduled to increase to 100% in the 2026 fourth quarter.

catalysts.event: Receipt of remaining $61 million investment from Prospect bankruptcy
catalysts.sentence: We expect to receive our remaining investment of $61 million in 2026.

catalysts.event: Former Steward-operated re-tenanted properties ramp to 100% cash rents
catalysts.sentence: Excluding these three facilities, the new tenants are currently paying 59% of contractual rents, which is expected to increase to 100% by the 2026 fourth quarter.

catalysts.event: One-time tax benefit from U.K. REIT additions
catalysts.sentence: Seven additional entities in the U.K. were added to our U.K. REIT effective February 1, 2026, which we expect to result in an approximate $40 million one-time tax benefit in the first quarter of 2026.

catalysts.event: Repayment of $500 million senior unsecured notes due October 2026
catalysts.sentence: At February 23, 2026, we only have 500 million of our 0.993% Senior Unsecured Notes due 2026 coming due in the next twelve months, as we have provided notice of our intent (and believe we will meet all conditions to do so) to extend the revolving portion of our Credit Facility to June 2027.

tamClaims.claim: Approximately 5,100 community hospitals in the U.S.
tamClaims.sentence: For example, according to the 2024 American Hospital Association statistics report, there were approximately 5,100 community hospitals throughout the U.S.
